commands.review_summary:
The PR lets Mattermost pass `allowProgressCallbacksWhenSourceDeliverySuppressed` when draft tool-progress previews are enabled and adds an inbound dispatch regression test for message-tool-only source replies.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +71. Total +74 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though not from a live run in this review. Mattermost currently wires draft progress callbacks, dispatch suppresses them under `message_tool_only` unless the allow flag is set, and the linked reporter confirmed the v2026.5.28 live symptom.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is needed; the remaining blocker is real live behavior proof or explicit maintainer acceptance, not a code change.

target.title: fix(mattermost): preserve Codex progress drafts
target.body:
Fixes #88766

## Summary
- Allow Mattermost draft tool-progress callbacks to keep running when source reply delivery is `message_tool_only`.
- Preserve the existing final-reply delivery behavior; this only restores the in-flight draft preview path.
- Add regression coverage for the Mattermost inbound dispatch path so the source-suppressed progress flag stays wired.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Mattermost turns using Codex/message-tool-only source delivery now keep channel-owned draft progress callbacks enabled while final source replies remain suppressed.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on Linux using the Mattermost monitor inbound harness and the shared dispatch regression suite; no live Mattermost server was used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.inbound-system-event.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts
pnpm tsgo:extensions:test
pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.inbound-system-event.test.ts
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix: the new Mattermost inbound regression passes with `replyOptions.sourceReplyDeliveryMode` still set to `message_tool_only`, `replyOptions.allowProgressCallbacksWhenSourceDeliverySuppressed` set to `true`, `replyOptions.suppressDefaultToolProgressMessages` set to `true`, and an `onToolStart` callback updating the Mattermost draft stream.

Observed result after fix: the Mattermost channel keeps the final reply in the existing message-tool-only path and exposes tool progress through the in-flight draft preview callback instead of requiring `visibleReplies: "automatic"`.

What was not tested: a live Mattermost workspace plus Codex harness turn; this PR uses source-level regression coverage for the exact Mattermost dispatch options and shared dispatch behavior.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.inbound-system-event.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.inbound-system-event.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
